channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Hubble captures a crimson stellar nursery sparkling with blue and white stars
item.description: Hubble captured a stunning view of LH 95, where about 2,500 young stars are still forming into full-fledged stars.

item.title: NASA's Hubble spots a stellar sparkler for the Fourth of July
item.description: NASA's Hubble Space Telescope captured a red, white, and blue view of one of the Milky Way's oldest star clusters for the national holiday.

item.title: Scientists may have solved the black hole information paradox
item.description: A new theory suggests black holes stop evaporating, leaving remnants that preserve all information.

item.title: NASA's Hubble captures a star-spangled sea of 500,000 stars
item.description: To mark the U.S. 250th anniversary, NASA released a Hubble image of Messier 3, a globular cluster with over 500,000 stars.
